slider-events.label: Event Slider (Static)
slider-events.description: Horizontal scrollable slider of event cards. You supply the event markup — use this for hand-curated event lists.

slots.name: event-list
slots.description: Container of event items (div with event markup per slide).

slider-events-feed.label: Event Slider (Feed)
slider-events-feed.description: Same horizontal slider as slider-events but auto-populated from the events API. Use when events should be pulled dynamically from a feed.

attrs.name: data-feed-type
attrs.description: Feed source. Omit for general events; use `academic` for the academic calendar.

attrs.name: data-filter-group-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter by.

slider-events-feed.notes: Requires a valid API token to fetch events. Without data-feed-type, fetches general events.
